title: Assistant Store Manager - Costa Coffee India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Costa Coffee India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!
